details: Attach a DeepSeek model provider to an agent node with curated chat and reasoning presets plus an optional custom model override.

agentOps.appDescription: Fast open-weight chat and reasoning models exposed through an OpenAI-compatible API.

fields.label: Auth secret group
fields.help_text: Optional. If set, this node resolves authentication secrets from the selected secret group by assignment key or grouped secret name.

fields.label: API key provider
fields.help_text: Optional. Leave blank to search all enabled providers in scope.

fields.label: Custom model ID
fields.help_text: Optional advanced override. If set, this exact model ID is used instead of the selected preset.

fields.label: Extra body JSON
fields.help_text: Optional provider-specific fields merged into the request body after prompts and model.
